---
title: "Research supervision"
title-block-style: none
pagetitle: "Research supervision | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Current, completed and recorded research supervision by Dr Mesfin Genie."
page-layout: full
image: /assets/img/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><p class="eyebrow">Research supervision</p><h1>Health economics and applied policy research</h1><p class="lead">Principal supervision leads the supervisory team; co-supervision contributes specialist expertise within the panel.</p></div></header>
<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow"><h2>Current supervision</h2><ul class="timeline-list"><li><div class="meta">PhD · Principal Supervisor</div><h3>Understanding the Drivers of Telehealth Usage among Patients in Australia and How It Reduces Costs Relative to In-Person Healthcare Services</h3></li><li><div class="meta">PhD · Co-Supervisor · Expected 31 December 2028</div><h3>Economic Analysis of the Impact of Climate Change on the Agricultural Sector in the Solomon Islands</h3></li><li><div class="meta">PhD · Co-Supervisor</div><h3>Economic modelling of the impact of novel approaches for crop drought resilience using long-term trials in Australia</h3></li><li><div class="meta">PhD · Co-Supervisor</div><h3>Gendered Ageism in the Workplace: Menopause and Female Labour Market Participation</h3></li></ul><h2>Completed supervision</h2><ul class="timeline-list"><li><div class="meta">PhD · Co-Supervisor · Completed 13 March 2025</div><h3>Health Systems Reform Dynamics: Implications for Equity and Efficiency</h3></li></ul><h2>Recorded supervision</h2><p class="muted">The following records carry a date of 10 November 2024; the source supplied does not confirm that this is the completion date.</p><ul class="timeline-list"><li><div class="meta">MPhil · Principal Supervisor</div><h3>Socio-economic and Behavioural Impacts of COVID-19 Vaccine Mandates: A Scoping Review</h3></li><li><div class="meta">MPhil · Principal Supervisor</div><h3>The Socio-economic and Behavioural Impacts of Influenza Vaccine Mandates on Healthcare Workers: A Scoping Review</h3></li></ul><div class="callout"><strong>Prospective students:</strong> Please send a CV, academic transcripts, a concise research proposal, and details of research experience and publications where applicable.</div></div></section>
```
